query:
SELECT 'unidades' as tabla, COUNT(*) as total FROM unidades WHERE codigo LIKE '%30000%' OR nombre LIKE '%30000%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'items' as tabla, COUNT(*) as total FROM items WHERE codigo LIKE '%30000%' OR descripcion LIKE '%30000%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'proyectos' as tabla, COUNT(*) as total FROM proyectos WHERE nombre LIKE '%30000%' OR codigo LIKE '%30000%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'usuarios' as tabla, COUNT(*) as total FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%30000%' OR email LIKE '%30000%';
